creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-12-24 19:39:26 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/py-mwlib.ext   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  mwlib.ext provides external dependencies needed by the mwlib
  library. It contains a copy of reportlab, which is a BSD
  licensed pdf generation library.
  
  WWW:    http://code.pediapress.com/
  
  PR:             ports/129835
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3299    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +21 -0     ports/devel/py-mwlib.ext/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/py-mwlib.ext/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/devel/py-mwlib.ext/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +596 -0    ports/devel/py-mwlib.ext/pkg-plist (new)
